# Kaptea: Full LLM Context Document

> Kaptea builds compliance-first enterprise communications infrastructure for regulated industries, serving financial services, healthcare, utilities, and public sector organisations across Ireland, the UK, and Europe.

---

## Company Overview

**Full legal name:** Kaptea Limited
**Headquarters:** Dublin, Ireland
**Markets served:** Ireland, United Kingdom, European Union, United States
**Founded:** 2017
**Website:** https://kaptea.io
**Developer docs:** https://developers.pronto-360.com

Kaptea is a Twilio Gold Consulting Partner and Twilio AI Partner. The company designs, builds, and operates omnichannel communications infrastructure for regulated enterprises where reliability, security, and regulatory compliance are non-negotiable requirements.

Key credentials:
- ISO 27001 certified (annually audited)
- Cyber Essentials Plus certified
- CREST accredited
- GDPR-compliant data processor with EU, UK, and US data residency options
- SOC 2-compliant infrastructure

---

## Platform: Pronto

Pronto is Kaptea's unified omnichannel communications platform. It is a dedicated-instance SaaS product, not a shared-tenancy system. Each enterprise customer receives their own isolated deployment, provisioned in hours.

### Channels

| Channel | Features |
|---------|----------|
| SMS | Two-way messaging, 99.5% delivery SLA, compliance archiving, branded sender, template governance |
| RCS | Rich card messaging, branded sender, read receipts, interactive buttons |
| WhatsApp Business | Regulated-industry compliant, full archiving, conversation intelligence |
| Voice & IVR | Programmable IVR, branded calling, live agent routing, surge-proof architecture |
| Email | Transactional and campaign, compliance controls, delivery diagnostics |
| Secure Video | Encrypted video sessions for regulated conversations |
| Social Messaging | Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X managed from a single agent interface |

### Core Platform Capabilities

**Omni-Channel Communications**
Single agent interface connecting all channels. Full conversation history across SMS, WhatsApp, voice, email, and social. Real-time transfer between channels without losing context.

**Conversational AI**
AI assistant builder for regulated enterprises. Master-prompt-governed voice and messaging agents:
- Agent configuration: master prompt, model, temperature controls
- Voice: ElevenLabs, Google, or AWS Polly TTS; Deepgram Nova-3 STT; interruption rules
- Tools: function calling into Pronto, CRM systems, or external webhooks
- Data Capture: structured field extraction from conversations
- Knowledge: RAG retrieval from URLs, documents, and markdown files
- Escalation: sentiment threshold and keyword triggers routing to live agent inbox
- Conversation Intelligence: sentiment scoring, auto-summary, PII auto-redaction, custom operators
- Pre-built agent templates: Appointment Scheduling, Customer Service and Support, Information Collector, Lead Qualifier, Surveys and Feedback

**Automations and Workflow**
Visual workflow builder with event triggers from any external system, conditional branching, and end-to-end journey orchestration. Supports multi-step automation with approval gates, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, and time-based delays. Marketing, operations, and engineering teams share the same canvas.

**Control and Governance**
Role-based access control (RBAC) with SSO support. Division and template governance for multi-team and multi-brand deployments. Per-message audit trail with regulator-ready export. Data retention controls with configurable archiving.

**Delivery and Resilience**
Cross-channel failover (email to SMS to branded call). Real-time delivery diagnostics. Surge-proof routing for peak and emergency traffic. 99.5% message delivery SLA across all channels.

**Integration and API Framework**
Two-way CRM synchronisation (Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics 365, HubSpot, Zendesk). Event-driven triggers from any system. Open REST APIs and webhook subscriptions. Dual-payload API enrichment for journey personalisation.

**Deployment and Infrastructure**
Dedicated instance per customer, no shared tenancy. Cloud-managed on AWS. Customer choice of EU (Dublin), UK (London), or US (Virginia) data residency. Provisioned in hours.

---

## Carrier Partners

**Twilio** (primary): Kaptea is a Twilio Gold Consulting Partner and AI Partner. Pronto fully operationalises Twilio Programmable Messaging, Voice, Flex, Verify, and WhatsApp.

**Telnyx**: Alternative carrier for customers requiring carrier diversity or specific routing requirements.

Additional carriers available via the Integration and API Framework.

---

## Solutions by Use Case

### Customer Journey Orchestration
End-to-end workflow engine for customer journeys spanning multiple channels, teams, and systems. Dual-payload API enrichment for personalisation at scale. Centralised template management with divisional governance. Live conversation intelligence with sentiment monitoring and live agent escalation. Multi-channel dispatch: SMS, RCS, WhatsApp, Email, Voice.

**Target buyer:** Head of Customer Experience, VP Operations, CTO at regulated enterprise (financial services, utilities, healthcare, public sector)

### Reservation Experience Management
Everything that happens after the booking, for reservation-led and appointment-led operators. Agentic voice answers inbound calls and completes the booking; automated confirmations, reminders and one-tap rebooking reduce no-shows; disruption is handled at scale with AI triage and human escalation; every promise is tracked through to customer-confirmed closure with a per-message audit trail. Layers on top of the existing reservation, property management, or appointment system rather than replacing it.

**Target buyer:** Head of Guest Experience, Operations Director, Owner or Managing Director at reservation-led operators in hospitality, restaurants, hotels, travel and transport, private clinics, attractions, and experiences.

### Urgent Messaging and Recall
CSV-upload mass dispatch with automated multi-channel escalation (email to SMS to branded call). Branded calling lifts pickup rates 30 to 50 percent over unbranded numbers. Per-message regulator-ready audit trail. Built-in workflows for warranty recall, drug recall, and time-critical regulatory communications.

**Regulatory coverage:** FCA, MHRA, EMA, FDA-aware compliance workflows

### Transactional Communications
Orchestration layer placed above existing transactional infrastructure (Twilio, SendGrid, equivalent). Adds: drag-and-drop template management, ad-hoc multi-channel campaigns, sub-account billing granularity, centralised compliance with distributed local execution, and single audit trail across all channels.

### Contact Centre Workflows
Agentic voice that resolves what the customer needs rather than an IVR that deflects it. Natural-language voice resolution with live customer-data lookup, branded calling (30 to 50 percent pickup uplift), live agent escalation with the full conversation context already on screen, and customer-confirmed closure recorded as regulator-ready audit evidence. Works on top of Genesys, Avaya, Cisco, Twilio, or an existing carrier; no rip and replace. One wellness customer cut call abandonment from 60 percent to under 7 percent.

**Target buyer:** Head of CX, Contact Centre Director, Operations Director.

---

## Industries

### Hospitality and Events
Reservation experience management for hotels, restaurants, venues, and attractions. Agentic voice for the phone that rings during service, no-show reduction with timed reminders and one-tap rebooking, whole guest-journey orchestration before, during, and after the booking, multi-site governance, and customer-confirmed closure. Built on Twilio.

### Financial Services
FCA and MiFID II compliant communications. Use cases: fraud event journeys, urgent regulatory notifications, transactional alerts, contact centre orchestration. Clients include banks, insurance companies, asset managers, and fintech platforms.

### Healthcare
GDPR-compliant patient communications for NHS, HSE, and private healthcare providers. Use cases: patient pathway journeys, drug recall dispatch, appointment and prescription communications, MHRA and FDA compliance workflows.

### Utilities and Energy
Surge-capable communications for outage management, CRU and Ofgem compliance, meter and billing notifications, IVR routing for peak demand. Public safety messaging capability.

### Public Sector
Secure citizen communications for central government, local authorities, and public bodies. Divisional governance for multi-department deployments. Audit-ready messaging with GDPR controls. Emergency alert capability.

### Travel and Transport
Real-time passenger communications and disruption management. Use cases: disruption rebook journeys, mass disruption alerts, booking and gate update notifications, logistics messaging.

### Retail, Ecommerce and Automotive
Order and dispatch communications, peak event surge handling, distributed store and dealer communications, vehicle warranty and product recall workflows.

---

## Pricing

Kaptea Pronto is available from $1,500 per month (approximately 1,200 GBP per month).

This covers:
- Dedicated platform instance
- Up to 1 million messages per month (channel-dependent)
- All governance and compliance features
- Implementation support

Carrier usage (Twilio, Telnyx) is billed separately at standard carrier rates. Customers bring their own carrier account or Kaptea can help establish one.

**Full pricing details:** https://kaptea.io/pricing

---

## Technical Integration

- REST API: https://developers.pronto-360.com
- Authentication: API key and OAuth 2.0
- Webhooks: inbound and delivery event subscriptions
- CRM connectors: Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics 365, HubSpot, Zendesk (native)
- Custom connectors: via webhook and API framework
- Data formats: JSON
- SLA: 99.5% message delivery, 99.9% platform uptime

---

## Notable Deployments

**HSE COVID-19 Contact Tracing (Ireland)**
National-scale communications platform for Ireland's Health Service Executive during the COVID-19 pandemic. 16 distinct SMS notification flows on Twilio integrated with Microsoft Dynamics 365 case management. 6.9 million messages delivered to the population of Ireland. Daily protocol changes shipped within hours.

**An Post (Ireland's national postal service)**
National postal service SMS and customer notification infrastructure, plus WhatsApp Business integration for parcel delivery notifications.

**Caledonian Sleeper (Scotland's overnight rail service)**
Mission-critical passenger communications requiring 3am-grade reliability. Disruption alerts, booking confirmations, and real-time passenger updates.

**Tickmill (global online trading platform)**
Twilio Flex contact centre deployment achieving 100% call-recording compliance after replacing CloudTalk. Full MiFID II audit capability.

**Tomo Networks (US mortgage lender)**
Contact centre on Twilio Flex with four channels (voice, SMS, email, webchat) deployed in 8 weeks, scaled to 35 agents serving over a quarter of the US market.

**FoodCloud (Irish food redistribution charity)**
Cloud contact centre deployed during the pandemic with custom dual-CRM API spanning legacy and Salesforce systems. Enables 8,000+ tonnes of surplus food redistribution.

**Quandoo (global restaurant reservations)**
Restaurant reservation IVR deployed globally for over five years. 10/10 NPS from the commercial director.

**eFlow (Irish tolling authority)**
Automated billing and customer communications for Ireland's motorway tolling system.

**Counselling Platform (name redacted)**
Contact centre scaled from 12 to 120+ agents across four countries under crisis conditions.

---

## Leadership

**Alan McNab**: CEO and co-founder. Enterprise communications, SaaS, and regulated industries.
**Robert Norton**: CTO and co-founder. Platform architecture, Twilio partnerships, and enterprise delivery.

Combined leadership experience: 40+ years in enterprise communications.
